title: CNN Heroes Program Celebrates Everyday Champions Making Extraordinary Impact
description: CNN's annual Heroes program highlights ordinary people doing extraordinary work to help others around the world.
lede: Every year, CNN Heroes shines a spotlight on remarkable individuals who dedicate their lives to helping others. These everyday champions tackle some of the world's most pressing challenges with innovative solutions and unwavering determination.

sections.heading: Recognizing Unsung Champions
paragraphs: The CNN Heroes program was launched to celebrate ordinary people doing extraordinary work in their communities. These individuals often work tirelessly behind the scenes, making significant impacts without seeking recognition or fame.
Each hero featured represents the power of individual action to create meaningful change, inspiring others to get involved in their own communities.

sections.heading: Global Impact Stories
paragraphs: CNN Heroes feature stories span across continents, highlighting diverse challenges and creative solutions. From education initiatives in remote villages to healthcare programs in underserved areas, these heroes address critical needs with innovative approaches.
The program demonstrates how grassroots efforts can scale to create lasting change, often starting with one person's vision to help their neighbors.

sections.heading: The Selection Process
paragraphs: Nominees for CNN Heroes undergo a rigorous selection process, with stories verified by CNN's editorial team. The network receives thousands of nominations each year from viewers around the world.
Selected heroes receive not only recognition but also funding to expand their work, amplifying their impact through increased visibility and resources.

sections.heading: Community Transformation
paragraphs: Many CNN Heroes have transformed entire communities through their dedication. Their work often addresses root causes of problems, creating sustainable solutions that continue long after initial interventions.
The ripple effects of their efforts inspire local involvement and create networks of support that strengthen community resilience.

sections.heading: Inspiring Future Leaders
paragraphs: The CNN Heroes program serves as a platform to inspire the next generation of changemakers. By showcasing diverse stories of service, it demonstrates that anyone can make a difference regardless of their background or resources.
These stories of hope and determination provide powerful examples of how individual action can create positive change in an often challenging world.

sections.heading: Legacy of Service
paragraphs: CNN Heroes have collectively impacted millions of lives through their work. The program has become more than recognition—it's a movement that celebrates the human capacity for compassion and action.
As the program continues, it remains a testament to the power of highlighting positive stories and the extraordinary impact of ordinary people committed to helping others.

faqs.a: CNN Heroes are nominated by viewers and selected through a comprehensive review process by CNN's editorial team, who verify the impact and authenticity of their work.

faqs.q: What kind of support do CNN Heroes receive?
faqs.a: Beyond recognition, CNN Heroes often receive funding to expand their work, increased visibility for their causes, and connections to resources that help amplify their impact.

faqs.q: Can anyone nominate a CNN Hero?
faqs.a: Yes, viewers can nominate individuals who are making a difference in their communities through CNN's official nomination process available on their website.

faqs.q: What types of work do CNN Heroes typically do?
faqs.a: CNN Heroes work across diverse areas including education, healthcare, environmental protection, disaster relief, and social justice, addressing critical needs in their communities.

faqs.q: How long has the CNN Heroes program been running?
faqs.a: The CNN Heroes program has been recognizing extraordinary individuals for over a decade, building a legacy of celebrating community champions and inspiring positive action worldwide.
